sentences.arabic: كَانَ هُنَاكَ عُصْفُورٌ صَغِيرٌ يَعِيشُ فَوْقَ شَجَرَةٍ عَالِيَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Bio jednom jedan mali vrabac koji je živio na visokom drvetu.
sentences.translationEn: There was a small bird living on a high tree.

sentences.arabic: فِي يَوْمٍ مِنَ الْأَيَّامِ، غَرَّدَ الْعُصْفُورُ بِصَوْتٍ عَذْبٍ.
sentences.translation: Jednog dana, vrabac je zapjevao slatkim glasom.
sentences.translationEn: One day, the bird chirped with a sweet voice.

sentences.translation: Lisica ga je čula i htjela ga je pojesti.
sentences.translationEn: A fox heard him and wanted to eat him.

sentences.arabic: لَكِنَّ الْعُصْفُورَ كَانَ ذَكِيًّا وَطَارَ بَعِيدًا.
sentences.translation: Ali vrabac je bio pametan i odletio je daleko.
sentences.translationEn: But the bird was clever and flew away.

sentences.arabic: هَكَذَا تَعَلَّمْنَا أَنَّ الْحَذَرَ مَطْلُوبٌ فِي الْحَيَاةِ.
sentences.translation: Tako smo naučili da je oprez neophodan u životu.
sentences.translationEn: Thus we learned that caution is required in life.
